text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 103 

MDCR_PTBNI_TOTAL_FFS_SPEND 

LABEL: Medicare FFS Payment Amount — Part B Non-Institutional 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payment amount from all Part B non-institutional claims for the 
beneficiary during the year. The Part B non-institutional claims include: Carrier and durable medical 
equipment (DME). Note that only fee-for-service (FFS) claims are included. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE:
